description: Add private/shared visibility toggle for email connections. Private boxes visible only to owner, shared boxes visible to all team gestionnaires. Contextual sharing via conversations with 'Shared with me' section.

userStories.title: DB Migration: visibility columns + email_shares table + trigger
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the database schema to support private/shared email connections with auto-propagation of thread shares
acceptanceCriteria: team_email_connections has added_by_user_id (NOT NULL) and visibility ('private'|'shared', default 'shared') columns
Existing connections backfilled: visibility='shared', added_by_user_id=first team admin
email_shares table created with UNIQUE(email_id, shared_with_user_id)
RLS on email_shares: select for shared_with/shared_by/team_manager, insert/delete for team_manager
RLS on team_email_connections SELECT updated: shared OR own private
Trigger auto_share_thread_emails propagates shares on new email insert for private connections
Indexes created for email_shares and new columns
npm run supabase:types regenerates types
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Migration 20260318100000. Fixed team_members.joined_at (not created_at). Backfill uses admin then gestionnaire fallback. Trigger uses SECURITY DEFINER + email_connection_id filter.

userStories.title: Service layer: EmailVisibilityService + EmailShareRepository
userStories.description: As a developer, I need centralized visibility logic and share management
acceptanceCriteria: EmailVisibilityService.getAccessibleConnectionIds(supabase, teamId, userId) returns shared + own private connection IDs
EmailVisibilityService.isPrivateConnection(supabase, connectionId) returns boolean
EmailShareRepository with createSharesForThread(), getSharedWithUser(), getSharedEmailIds()
EmailConnectionRepository updated: createConnection accepts visibility + added_by_user_id
EmailConnectionRepository.getAccessibleConnections(teamId, userId) method added
EmailConnectionRepository.updateVisibility(connectionId, visibility) method added
Types updated in email-integration.ts
Lint passes
userStories.notes: EmailVisibilityService at lib/services/domain/. EmailShareRepository at lib/services/repositories/. EmailConnectionRepository updated with DTO + 2 new methods. Types extended with EmailVisibility + EmailShare.

userStories.title: API routes: visibility filtering on emails, counts, connections
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I only see emails from connections I have access to (shared + my private)
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/emails filters by accessible connection IDs (uses service role + app-level filtering)
GET /api/emails supports folder=shared-with-me returning emails from email_shares
GET /api/emails/counts returns user-aware counts (only accessible connections + shared-with-me count)
GET /api/emails/connections returns only accessible connections (shared + own private)
POST /api/emails/connections accepts visibility + stores added_by_user_id from auth context
Lint passes
userStories.notes: All 3 email API routes + OAuth callback updated. EmailRepository.getEmailsByFolder/getSentRepliesForThreads accept connectionIds[] for visibility filtering. Counts route adds sharedWithMe count.

userStories.title: API route: shared-with-me groups for sidebar
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, the sidebar shows emails shared with me grouped by source connection
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/emails/shared-with-me/groups returns groups with connection info + thread summaries
Each group has: connection (id, email_address, owner_name), threads (subject, email_count, shared_by, shared_at)
Only returns data for the authenticated user
Lint passes
userStories.notes: New route at /api/emails/shared-with-me/groups. Uses EmailShareRepository.getSharedWithUser() with service role client.

userStories.title: Server actions: create email_shares on conversation participant add
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, when I create a conversation on a private email and add colleagues, they automatically get access to the email thread
acceptanceCriteria: createEmailConversationAction checks if email belongs to private connection
If private: creates email_shares for all thread emails x all participants
addEmailConversationParticipantsAction does the same for newly added participants
Shares are idempotent (ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Both createEmailConversationAction and addEmailConversationParticipantsAction now create email_shares for private connections. Non-blocking try/catch pattern.

userStories.title: UI: Toggle private/shared in email connection form
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, when adding a new email connection I can choose private or shared visibility
acceptanceCriteria: Switch component in both Gmail OAuth and IMAP/SMTP tabs
Labels: 'Prive' / 'Partage' with contextual help text that changes
Default value: Partage (shared)
Value sent to POST /api/emails/connections as 'visibility' field
Lint passes
userStories.notes: VisibilityToggle component with Switch + contextual text in both OAuth and IMAP tabs. OAuth flow passes visibility through encrypted state. GmailOAuthService.OAuthState extended.

userStories.title: UI: Connection list badge + visibility toggle in settings
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I see which connections are private/shared and can change the visibility
acceptanceCriteria: Badge 'Prive' or 'Partage' displayed next to each connection in settings
Action dropdown has 'Changer la visibilite' option
Confirmation dialog when switching Partage -> Prive with warning message
No confirmation needed for Prive -> Partage
Visibility update calls PATCH/PUT endpoint
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Badge (Lock/Users icons) + toggle button in connection list. PATCH /api/emails/connections/[id] endpoint created. Confirmation AlertDialog for shared→private. No confirmation for private→shared.

userStories.title: UI: Mailbox sidebar with 3 sections + shared-with-me
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, the sidebar shows my private boxes, shared boxes, and emails shared with me in separate sections
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar has 3 collapsible sections: 'Mes boites privees', 'Boites partagees', 'Partages avec moi'
Private connections show lock icon, shared show team icon
'Partages avec moi' shows threads grouped by source connection
Clicking a connection filters emails for that connection
Clicking a thread in 'Partages avec moi' shows those emails
'Tous les emails' shows all accessible emails
Lint passes
userStories.notes: 3 collapsible sections with Lock/Users/Share2 icons. EmailConnection type extended with visibility. page.tsx fetches visibility-aware connections via EmailVisibilityService + shared-with-me groups via EmailShareRepository. 'Tous les emails' button always visible. Threads grouped by source connection with owner name.

userStories.title: SSR: mail page pre-fetches user-aware data
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, the mail page loads with correct visibility-filtered data on first render
acceptanceCriteria: mail/page.tsx passes userId to connection/email queries
Initial connections are filtered by visibility
Initial counts are user-aware
Shared-with-me groups pre-fetched for sidebar
Client service updated with getSharedWithMeGroups() method
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Phase 0 fetches accessibleConnectionIds once, reused by getEmailCounts (filters sourceCounts) and getEmailConnectionsFromIds. userId passed to MailClient. getSharedWithMeGroups pre-fetched in parallel. EmailClientService.getSharedWithMeGroups() added for client refresh.
